debug_info.goal:
case succ
L : Logic ℕ
χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
φ : Formula ℕ
hφ : φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
i : ℕ
ih :
  φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i →
    χ ➝ φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T ∨
      ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)),
        ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ) →
          Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
hi :
  φ ∈
    @LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction.match_1 (fun x => Set (Formula ℕ)) (decode i)
      (fun δ =>
        if
            ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)),
              ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i →
                Γ.conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T then
          insert δ (LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i)
        else LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i)
      fun _ => LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i
⊢ χ ➝ φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T ∨
    ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)),
      ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ) →
        Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T

      · have hi' : φ ∈ construction T hT i := by
          simpa [hdec, hcond] using hi
        exact ih hi'

classical
    cases hdec : decode i with
    | none =>
        have : φ ∈ construction T hT i := by simpa [construction, hdec] using hi
        exact ih this
    | some δ =>
        by_cases hcond :
          (∀ Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ),
            (↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i) → (Γ.conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory))
        · have hmem : φ = δ ∨ φ ∈ construction T hT i := by
            simpa [construction, hdec, hcond] using hi
          cases hmem with
          | inl hφδ =>
              right
              intro Γ hΓ
              subst hφδ
              have hΓ' : (↑Γ : Set (Formula ℕ)) ⊆ construction T hT i := by
                intro x hx
                have : x ∈ insert δ (construction T hT i) := hΓ hx
                simpa using this
              exact hcond Γ hΓ'
          | inr hφT =>
              exact ih hφT
        · have : φ ∈ construction T hT i := by simpa [construction, hdec, hcond] using hi
          exact ih this

by_cases hdec : decode i = some φ
    · have henc : encode φ = i := by
        have := congrArg encode hdec
        simpa using this
      subst henc
      cases hif : (∀ Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ), (↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT (encode φ)) → Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory) with
      | _ =>
        simp [hdec, hif] at hi
        rcases hi with hmem | rfl
        · exact ih hmem
        · right

    | none =>
      have : φ ∈ construction T hT i := by simpa [hdec] using hi
      exact ih this

        (∀ Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ), (↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i) → Γ.conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory)
      · have : φ ∈ insert δ (construction T hT i) := by simpa [hdec, hcond] using hi
        rcases Set.mem_insert_iff.mp this with rfl | hmem
        · right
          intro Γ hΓ
          have hΓ' : (↑Γ : Set (Formula ℕ)) ⊆ construction T hT i := by
            intro x hx
            exact (subset_construction_add (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := i) (j := (encode δ) - i))
              (hΓ hx)
          exact hcond Γ hΓ'
        · exact ih hmem
      · have : φ ∈ construction T hT i := by simpa [hdec, hcond] using hi
        exact ih this
rcases hdec : decode i with (δ | ) <

classical
    cases hdec : decode i with
    | none =>
      have : φ ∈ construction T hT i := by simpa [hdec] using hi
      exact ih this
    | some δ =>
      by_cases hcond :
        ∀ Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ),
          ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i → Γ.conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory
      · have hmem : φ = δ ∨ φ ∈ construction T hT i := by
          have : φ ∈ insert δ (construction T hT i) := by simpa [hdec, hcond] using hi
          simpa [Set.mem_insert_iff] using this
        cases hmem with
        | inl hφδ =>
          right
          subst hφδ
          intro Γ hΓ
          have hΓ' : (↑Γ : Set (Formula ℕ)) ⊆ construction T hT i := by
            intro x hx
            have hx' : x ∈ construction T hT (encode δ) := hΓ hx
            have hle : encode δ ≤ encode δ := le_rfl
            exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (χ := χ) (ξ := ξ) hle) hx'
          exact hcond Γ hΓ'
        | inr hφmem =>
          exact ih hφmem
      · have : φ ∈ construction T hT i := by simpa [hdec, hcond] using hi
        exact ih this

classical
    cases hdec : (decode i) with
    | none =>
        have : φ ∈ construction T hT i := by simpa [hdec] using hi
        exact ih this
    | some δ =>
        by_cases hcond :
          (∀ Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ), (↑Γ : Set (Formula ℕ)) ⊆ construction T hT i → Γ.conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory)
        · have hmem : φ = δ ∨ φ ∈ construction T hT i := by
            have : φ ∈ insert δ (construction T hT i) := by simpa [hdec, hcond] using hi
            simpa [Set.mem_insert_iff] using this
          cases hmem with
          | inl hφδ =>

                intro x hx
                have : x ∈ construction T hT (encode δ) := hΓ hx
                exact monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (hij := Nat.le_succ i) this
              exact hcond Γ hsub
          | inr hφi =>
              exact ih hφi
        · have : φ ∈ construction T hT i := by simpa [hdec, hcond] using hi
